classification.reasoning: The patch consists primarily of exact string replacements and minor API adjustments, such as changing method signatures and wrapping privileges in a new RolePrivileges object. Most hunks were found via 'git_exact' with high confidence, indicating the patch applies cleanly and directly to the target branch. One hunk was found with lower confidence via 'git_pickaxe', but overall the changes are straightforward and do not involve structural or deep refactoring. Therefore, the patch is classified as TYPE_I with high confidence.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Replaced direct use of a Set of privileges with a new RolePrivileges object when updating roles map.

hunk_descriptions.intent: To encapsulate the privileges within a RolePrivileges instance, likely for better abstraction or type safety.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed the argument passed to role.with from a Set of privileges to a new RolePrivileges object.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: PrivilegesModifier class, in code constructing newRoles map
hunk_descriptions.intent: To standardize privilege representation by wrapping the privileges set into a RolePrivileges object.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Updated role.with call to use a RolePrivileges instance wrapping the updatedPrivileges set instead of passing the set directly.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: PrivilegesModifier class, inside method updating newRoles map and metadata builder
hunk_descriptions.intent: To ensure privileges are consistently encapsulated in RolePrivileges objects for roles metadata updates.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Modified role.with invocation to accept a RolePrivileges object instead of a Set of privileges when updating newRoles map.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: PrivilegesModifier class, method returning new RolesMetadata
hunk_descriptions.intent: To unify privilege handling by using RolePrivileges wrapper consistently when creating updated roles.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Replaced the method with(Set<Privilege>) with overloaded methods accepting RolePrivileges and Set<GrantedRole> respectively, returning new Role instances accordingly.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To provide more flexible and type-safe ways to create modified Role instances by accepting RolePrivileges directly and supporting granted roles updates.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed the boolean flag passed to the Role constructor from false to the isSuperUser field value.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: Role class, constructor invocation inside with method
hunk_descriptions.intent: To preserve the isSuperUser status when creating new Role instances instead of resetting it to false.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Simplified role update logic by replacing explicit Role constructor call with a call to role.with(grantedRoles).
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: RolesMetadata class, method updating roles map
hunk_descriptions.intent: To leverage Role's with method for cleaner and more maintainable role updates involving granted roles.
